title: HAProxy Connection Retry and Redispatch Volume
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="haproxy:http"
| regex field=_raw "(?i)retry=(?<retry>\d+)"
| stats sum(retry) as retries by backend, server
| where retries > 100
description: Retries absorb brief faults but high volume masks systemic overload or brownouts.
value: Surfaces upstream instability that averages hide until SLAs break.
implementation: Extend `log-format` to include retry/redispatch counters; validate with `show stat`. Baseline per service.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We count retries so flaky backends are fixed before errors spread.
